reference_policy: official/primary sources first; stricter risk interpretation wins

references.title: GateZero Project Truth
references.why: Defines what the product is and is not; prevents bot/profit hype drift.

references.title: GateZero Product Wedge
references.why: Locks the product promise: no trade without evidence, no execution without risk approval.

references.title: GateZero Risk Rules
references.why: Hard safety constraints that outrank feature appetite.

references.title: Financial Risk Gates
references.why: Defines the allowed autonomy level and promotion/rollback path.

references.title: PostgreSQL Official Documentation
references.why: Source of truth for transactions, constraints, indexes, isolation, and data integrity.

references.title: Node.js Official Documentation
references.why: Runtime, async behavior, streams, process handling, and security-sensitive APIs.

references.title: Fastify Documentation
references.why: High-performance Node API patterns, validation, hooks, plugins.

references.title: OWASP ASVS
references.why: Requirements for authentication, session, validation, logging, and secure API controls.

references.title: OpenTelemetry Documentation
references.why: Tracing, metrics, and logs for API/worker observability.
